prompts.abstract: A cube with rounded edges and a slightly protruding top surface.
prompts.description: A cube with rounded edges and a slightly protruding top surface.
prompts.beginner: The design involves creating a rectangular base with rounded edges. This base is approximately three-quarters of a unit long, just under seven-tenths of a unit wide, and slightly less than two-tenths of a unit high.
prompts.intermediate: Start by creating a new coordinate system with specific Euler angles and a translation vector. Next, draw a two-dimensional sketch on a new face, forming a rectangle with rounded edges. After scaling the sketch, transform it into three dimensions using the coordinate system settings. Finally, extrude the sketch to create a solid body. The resulting rectangular base has a height of approximately zero point one nine eight units, a width of about zero point six nine eight units, and a length of roughly zero point seven five units.
prompts.expert: Create a new coordinate system with Euler angles set to negative ninety, zero, and negative ninety degrees, and a translation vector of zero, zero, and zero. On this coordinate system, draw a two-dimensional sketch on a new face. The sketch consists of a closed loop made up of four lines. The first line starts at the origin and ends at coordinates zero point seven five, zero. The second line starts at zero point seven five, zero and ends at zero point seven five, zero point six nine eight two. The third line starts at zero point seven five, zero point six nine eight two and ends at zero, zero point six nine eight two. The fourth line starts at zero, zero point six nine eight two and returns to the origin. Scale this two-dimensional sketch by a factor of zero point seven five. Transform the scaled two-dimensional sketch into three dimensions by rotating it using the Euler angles and translating it using the translation vector defined in the coordinate system. Extrude the transformed two-dimensional sketch along the normal by zero point one nine eight units to create a three-dimensional solid body. The final dimensions of the rectangular base with rounded edges are length zero point seven four nine nine nine nine nine five zero one two three three five eight four units, width zero point six nine eight one nine zero seven one nine nine six nine two two nine units, and height zero point one nine seven nine five eight one three nine four one seven one two nine one four units.
prompts.all_level_data:
<level1>
Create a new coordinate system with Euler angles set to negative ninety, zero, and negative ninety degrees, and a translation vector of zero, zero, and zero. On this coordinate system, draw a two-dimensional sketch on a new face. The sketch consists of a closed loop made up of four lines. The first line starts at the origin and ends at coordinates zero point seven five, zero. The second line starts at zero point seven five, zero and ends at zero point seven five, zero point six nine eight two. The third line starts at zero point seven five, zero point six nine eight two and ends at zero, zero point six nine eight two. The fourth line starts at zero, zero point six nine eight two and returns to the origin. Scale this two-dimensional sketch by a factor of zero point seven five. Transform the scaled two-dimensional sketch into three dimensions by rotating it using the Euler angles and translating it using the translation vector defined in the coordinate system. Extrude the transformed two-dimensional sketch along the normal by zero point one nine eight units to create a three-dimensional solid body. The final dimensions of the rectangular base with rounded edges are length zero point seven four nine nine nine nine nine five zero one two three three five eight four units, width zero point six nine eight one nine zero seven one nine nine six nine two two nine units, and height zero point one nine seven nine five eight one three nine four one seven one two nine one four units.
</level1>

<level2>
Start by creating a new coordinate system with specific Euler angles and a translation vector. Next, draw a two-dimensional sketch on a new face, forming a rectangle with rounded edges. After scaling the sketch, transform it into three dimensions using the coordinate system settings. Finally, extrude the sketch to create a solid body. The resulting rectangular base has a height of approximately zero point one nine eight units, a width of about zero point six nine eight units, and a length of roughly zero point seven five units.
</level2>

<level3>
The design involves creating a rectangular base with rounded edges. This base is approximately three-quarters of a unit long, just under seven-tenths of a unit wide, and slightly less than two-tenths of a unit high.
</level3>
prompts.nli_data:
<part_1>
### Construct a Rectangular Base with Rounded Edges

#### Step 1: Create a New Coordinate System
- Set the Euler angles to \(-90.0\), \(0.0\), and \(-90.0\) degrees.
- Set the translation vector to \([0.0, 0.0, 0.0]\).

#### Step 2: Draw a 2D Sketch
- Create a new face.
- Draw a closed loop consisting of four lines:
  - **Line 1**: Start at \((0.0, 0.0)\) and end at \((0.75, 0.0)\).
  - **Line 2**: Start at \((0.75, 0.0)\) and end at \((0.75, 0.6982)\).
  - **Line 3**: Start at \((0.75, 0.6982)\) and end at \((0.0, 0.6982)\).
  - **Line 4**: Start at \((0.0, 0.6982)\) and end at \((0.0, 0.0)\).

#### Step 3: Scale the 2D Sketch
- Apply a scaling factor of \(0.75\) to the 2D sketch.

#### Step 4: Transform the Scaled 2D Sketch into 3D
- Rotate the 2D sketch using the Euler angles set in the coordinate system.
- Translate the 2D sketch using the translation vector set in the coordinate system.

#### Step 5: Extrude the 2D Sketch to Generate the 3D Model
- Extrude the 2D sketch towards the normal by \(0.198\) units.
- Do not extrude in the opposite direction of the normal.
- This operation will create a new solid body.

#### Final Dimensions
- **Length**: \(0.7499999501233584\) units
- **Width**: \(0.698190719969229\) units
- **Height**: \(0.19795813941712914\) units

This completes the construction of the rectangular base with rounded edges.
</part_1>
